# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation Guideline

## Purpose
Ensure architecture documentation includes clear, current visual representations.

## Rules
- Include a high-level system context diagram.
- Include a component or module interaction diagram.
- Include a runtime flow diagram for key user or service paths.
- Keep diagram nodes aligned with real package/module/service names in code.
- Update Mermaid diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes.
- Prefer Mermaid types: `flowchart`, `sequenceDiagram`, `classDiagram`, `graph TD`, `graph LR`.

## When to use
- Mandatory whenever creating or updating architecture documentation.
